title: Spring Chef Tasting Night
description: A multi-course tasting featuring four NFF chefs in residence, with seasonal Newark-grown ingredients and live storytelling between courses.

title: Newark Food Entrepreneurs Pop-Up Market
description: Twelve incubator vendors take over the venue for an afternoon of tastings, retail bites, and Q&A with the founders. Free entry, family-friendly.

title: Sunday Brunch Bazaar
description: A laid-back Sunday brunch market with eight local food makers, live DJ, and a chef-driven bloody mary bar. Walk in, eat well, support Newark food entrepreneurs.

title: Newark Business Network Summer Mixer
description: Hosted networking for Newark-area founders and operators. Curated bites from three NFF chefs and a short program highlighting local food businesses.

title: Newark Latin Heritage Dinner
description: A five-course tasting menu celebrating Caribbean, Mexican, and South American culinary traditions, prepared by three NFF chefs and paired with hand-selected wines.

title: Taste of Newark — Community Fundraiser
venue: Full Venue Buyout, Newark Food Factory
description: An evening of live cooking demos, signature dishes, and storytelling to support workforce-development scholarships in the NFF culinary program.

title: Stella & Sons Sauce Co. Launch Party
description: Celebrate the public launch of NFF incubator graduate Stella & Sons with tastings, retail bottles, founder Q&A, and live cooking demos using the new sauce line.

title: Chef Collab Dinner: South Asian × Caribbean
description: Two NFF resident chefs trade techniques and flavor traditions across a six-course collaborative menu with optional wine and cocktail pairings.
